sections.instruction: Rasmlarga qarang va gaplarni to'ldiring. Past Simple ning to'g'ri shaklini ishlating.
sections.instruction_ru: Посмотрите на картинки и закончите предложения. Используйте правильную форму Past Simple.

parts.content: I don't want to go and see the film because

parts.content: I don't need to worry about my homework because
I haven't got a PlayStation any more because
Mum is angry with me because

answers: I broke a window a week ago
